summary: AudioAssetRegistry already exists as SoundManifest.ts (Rule 8 compliant). This file is the Phase 0 audit companion, not a second registry.

rawSourcePack.finding: Every real audio file in the raw Sounds Pack is already cataloged in SoundManifest.ts. No hidden/unused sound files exist in this pack.

categoriesMissing.cypher: No dedicated cypher-specific entry — cypher currently rides on the shared 'battle' category (battle_beat_drop's trigger mentions cypher_beat_drop, but no distinct cypher-category sound exists).
categoriesMissing.vs_announcer: No 'VS' announcer/callout sound found in repo or raw pack.
categoriesMissing.player_turn: No Player 1 / Player 2 turn-callout sounds found in repo or raw pack.
categoriesMissing.radio: No radio category exists yet — expected, Rule 25 (Radio Network) is not built.
categoriesMissing.xp_levelup: No dedicated XP-gained or Level-Up sound entry exists in the manifest at all.

disconnectedEvents.listenerBehavior: Sets visual toast state only — never calls playSound().
disconnectedEvents.honestReplacementTrigger: achievement_unlocked (real file, conceptually close to level-up)
disconnectedEvents.fixComplexity: Trivial (one playSound() call) — not implemented this pass per Phase 0 audit-only directive.
